description: 第4周要求：在报告中给出一个可读的演示请求与对应响应。以下为 POST /generate 的脱敏样例，image_base64 用占位；真实全量可运行联调后从 *_response.json 获得。

body.task_description: Use a high-contrast header and keep alarm cards visually prominent.

response.preview_base64: iVBORw0KGgoB…（此处为实际 PNG 的 base64，长度可达数百万字符；见运行后 reports/*.json 全量）
response.explanation: Initial code generated from screenshot (PNG preview server-side via Playwright).

suggested.for: Instruction-based text edits to the current HTML.
Visual alignment vs reference: pass reference PNG, current code, and optional rendered PNG.
Re-render any HTML to PNG (same engine as inline previews).
